summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ALSA PRO ammunition manufacturer marketing website. All functionality working perfectly - navigation, hero section, stats, products, about timeline, news articles, contact form, mobile menu, and design elements all tested successfully.
passed_tests: Website loads correctly with proper design
Navigation menu links work (Produkty, O nás, Novinky, Kontakt)
E-Shop button functionality with correct external URL
Hero section CTA buttons visible and functional
Stats section displays all 4 statistics correctly
Products section shows featured product and 3 secondary product cards with specs
About section timeline displays all 4 milestones
News section shows all 3 article cards
Contact section displays contact info and functional form fields
Footer section present and properly structured
Contact form inputs work (name, email, message, submit button)
Orange brand color (#FF5500) properly implemented throughout design
Dark theme background colors implemented correctly
Czech language content present as requested
